title: HrdaValorant
description: Easy plugin for Valorant in Minecraft!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0c99a0aba64d7a7b01390c442b783101cac6452.png)

**A high-performance tactical shooter engine for Minecraft.**

HrdaValorant is a comprehensive plugin that recreates the core mechanics of tactical shooters. It features an automated round-based system, unique agent abilities, and a robust tactical economy. **Now updated for version 1.21-26.1.2**

## 🎨 HrdaValorant ResourcePack
Enhance your gameplay with custom 3D weapon models and immersive sound effects (kill sounds, aces, and ultimates). 
👉 Download the official expansion resource pack – [**HERE**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hrdaval-rp).

## Need Hosting? Use PROMO CODE!
![neyhost promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c69bf42453db60ec47c6505de21e7e647f4b68a5_0.webp)(https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=HRDA)

---

## ✨ Core Features
* ⚔️ **Buy Phase & Combat:** Structured rounds with automated barriers, interactive shop access, and economy management.
* 🕹️ **Multiple Game Modes:** Choose between **Normal** (13 wins), **Swiftplay** (5 wins), or **Ranked** mode!
* 🏆 **Competitive Ranked System:** Built-in Rank Rating (RR) system, competitive ranks (Iron to Radiant), and live leaderboard holograms.
* 💣 **The Spike:** Advanced planting/defusing logic with "Spike Drop" mechanics and real-time progress bars.
* 🛡️ **Tactical TTK & Armor:** Custom damage engine scaling perfectly with Light and Heavy Shields.
* 🔮 **Ultimate Economy:** Earn ultimate points through kills and defuses to unlock game-changing abilities (5 points required).
* 🔄 **Dynamic Side Swap:** Automatic team switching during half-time to ensure competitive fairness.
* 🔌 **PlaceholderAPI Support:** Display player ranks, RR, credits, and active agents anywhere on your server.

---

### 👤 Agent Roster & Tactical Abilities
<details>
<summary>Click to view all 15 Agents and their unique powers</summary>

#### **Duelists**
* **Phoenix:**
    * `[F]` *Blaze* – Creates a fire wall that blocks vision and heals you.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Run It Back** – Mark your location to return there with full HP after "death" or 10s.
* **Jett:**
    * `[F]` *Tailwind* – Instantly dashes Jett in the direction she is moving.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Blade Storm** – Equips deadly throwing knives that refresh on kills.
* **Raze:**
    * `[F]` *Paint Shells* – Throws a cluster grenade that releases sub-munitions on impact.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Showstopper** – Equips a rocket launcher that deals massive area damage and knockback. (NEW)
* **Iso:** 
  * `[F]`  *Contingency* – Summons a moving energy wall that blocks vision and projectiles.
  * `[Shift+F]` **Kill Contract** – Teleports you and enemy in special arena (setup with /val isoult)

#### **Initiators**
* **Sova:**
    * `[F]` *Recon Bolt* – Fires a sonar bolt that reveals enemies with a Glowing effect.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Hunter's Fury** – Fires up to three energy blasts that pierce walls and reveal enemies.
* **KAY/O:** 
    * `[F]` *FRAG/ment* – Throws an explosive grenade that pulses damage.
    * `[Shift+F]` **NULL/cmd** – Overloads with energy, pulsing to suppress enemies.
* **Gekko:** 
    * `[F]` *Dizzy* – Launches a creature that splashes enemies with blue ink, blinding them.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Thrash** – Steer a creature to detain enemies on impact.

#### **Sentinels**
* **Sage:** 
    * `[F]` *Healing Orb* – Right-click to heal yourself or a teammate back to full health.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Resurrection** – Revive a fallen teammate at your location.
* **Killjoy:** 
    * `[F]` *Nanoswarm* – Deploys a hidden grenade that creates a damaging swarm zone.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Lockdown** – Deploys a device that detains all enemies in a large radius.
* **Vyse:** 
  * `[F]` *Arc Rose* – Places a trap that can be triggered to flash enemies in its line of sight.
  * `[Shift+F]` **Steel Garden** - Makes enemy's main weapon jamed for few seconds (NEW). 
* **Chamber:** 
  * `[F]`*Headhunter* – Equips a powerful, high-accuracy heavy pistol.
  * `[Shift+F]` **Tour de Force** - Gives Chamber a powerful sniper weapon with slow radius on hit.

#### **Controllers**
* **Omen:**
    * `[F]` *Paranoia* – Fires a shadow projectile that passes through walls and blinds enemies.
    * `[Shift+F]` **From the Shadows** – Teleport to any location on the map after a brief channel.
* **Clove:**
    * `[F]` *Ruse* – Deploys a tactical smoke cloud to block enemy vision.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Not Dead Yet** – Resurrect after death; get a kill within 10s to stay alive. (NEW)
* **Viper:**
    * `[F]` *Poison Cloud* – Throws a canister that creates a toxic smoke screen.
    * `[Shift+F]`**Viper's Pit** - Creates a toxic pit giving poison and blidness to enemies.
* **Brimstone:**
    * `[F]` *Sky Smoke* – Launches a long-lasting, thick smoke grenade from the sky.
    * `[Shift+F]` **Orbital Strike** – Calls down a high-damage orbital laser on a selected area.

</details>

---

## 🏗️ Arena Setup Guide
<details>
<summary>Click for step-by-step Map Configuration</summary>

Follow these steps to configure your arena using the built-in setup system:

1. **Global Lobby:** Set the main server spawn point (where players go after a game):
   * `/val setlobby`

2. **Iso Ultimate Arena:** Set the spawns for Iso's 1v1 duel:
   * Go to Iso's side of the arena: `/val isoult iso`
   * Go to the Enemy's side of the arena: `/val isoult enemy`

3. **Map Setup:** Repeat these for every map you create:
   * **Waiting Lobby:** The pre-game room: `/val setwaitlobby <map>`
   * **Team Spawns:** * `/val setattackers <map>`
     * `/val setdefenders <map>`
   * **Plant Sites:**
     * `/val setplanta <map>`
     * `/val setplantb <map>`
     * `/val setplantc <map>` (Optional)
     * _Note: Spike can be planted within a 10 block radius of these points._

4. **Barriers:**
   * Mark two corners of the region: `/val pos1` and `/val pos2`
   * Save the barrier to the map: `/val addbarrier <map>`

5. **Game Mode & Limits:**
   * Set the capacity: `/val setminplayers <map> <amount>` and `/val setmaxplayers <map> <amount>`
   * Set the game mode: `/val mode <map> <normal/swift/ranked>`

6. **Extras (Optional):**
   * **Join Sign:** Look at a placed sign and type `/val sign <map>`
   * **Ranked Leaderboard:** Stand where you want the hologram and type `/val setleaderboard`

7. **Finalize:**
   * Use `/val reload` to ensure all locations are saved in the config.
</details>

---

## ⌨️ Commands & Permissions
<details>
<summary>Click to view all Commands and Permissions</summary>

### **Player Commands**
| Command | Description |
|:---|:---|
| `/val join <map>` | Joins the match on a specific map. |
| `/val leave` | Leaves the current game. |
| `/val team <attackers/defenders>` | Selects a team side. |
| `/val shop` | Opens the shop menu. |
| `/val agent` | Agent selection command. |
| `/val rank` | Shows your current rank, RR points, and points needed for the next rank. |

### **Admin & Setup Commands**
| Command | Description |
|:---|:---|
| `/val start` | Starts the match. |
| `/val setup` | Map configuration guide. |
| `/val setlobby` | Sets the global lobby. |
| `/val setwaitlobby <map>` | Sets the waiting lobby for a specific map. |
| `/val setattackers <map>` | Sets the attackers spawn for a specific map. |
| `/val setdefenders <map>` | Sets the defenders spawn for a specific map. |
| `/val setplanta <map>` | Sets the position for Bomb Site A. |
| `/val setplantb <map>` | Sets the position for Bomb Site B. |
| `/val setplantc <map>` | Sets the position for Bomb Site C. |
| `/val addbarrier <map>` | Adds a barrier to the specified map. |
| `/val pos1` / `/val pos2` | Position selection for setup. |
| `/val setminplayers <map> <amount>` | Sets the minimum players required to start the countdown on a map. |
| `/val setmaxplayers <map> <amount>` | Sets the maximum player capacity for a map. |
| `/val mode <map> <normal/swift/ranked>` | Sets the game mode for the map. |
| `/val sign <map>` | Creates a join sign on the targeted block. |
| `/val setleaderboard` | Spawns the top players hologram at your current location. |
| `/val isoult <iso/enemy>` | Sets spawn locations for Iso's ultimate duel. |
| `/val money <player> <amount>` | Command for managing money. |
| `/val reload` | Reloads the plugin configuration. |
| `/val delete <map>` | Deletes map data. |

### **Permissions**
* `valorant.admin` - Access to all administrative and setup commands.
</details>

## 🏷️ Placeholders
<details>
<summary>Click to view all PlaceholderAPI integrations</summary>

You can use these placeholders in any plugin that supports **PlaceholderAPI** (e.g., Scoreboards, Tablists, Chat formats, Holograms).

| Placeholder | Output Example | Description |
|:---|:---|:---|
| `%valorant_rank%` | `[Platinum]` | Displays the player's current competitive rank. |
| `%valorant_rr%` | `450` | Displays the player's current Rank Rating points. |
| `%valorant_agent%` | `JETT` | Shows the player's selected agent. |
| `%valorant_team%` | `ATTACKERS` | Shows the player's current team. |
| `%valorant_credits%` | `3900` | Displays the player's current balance/credits. |
| `%valorant_map%` | `Split` | Shows the name of the currently active map. |
| `%valorant_ult_points%` | `3/5` | Displays the player's current ultimate points. |
| `%valorant_state%` | `BUY_PHASE` | Shows the current state of the game. |
</details>
